message:
refactor(connectors): improve Discord gateway and Twitter client robustness

Discord connector improvements:
- connector.rs: Enhanced connection lifecycle handling with cleaner
  state transitions, improved error recovery, and better heartbeat
  timing precision
- gateway.rs: Minor gateway protocol refinements for edge cases

Twitter connector improvements:
- client.rs: HTTP client configuration updates for reliability
- connector.rs: Improved OAuth token refresh handling and rate limit
  response parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
